case_title: GERMAN MOTORS COLLISION CENTER ET AL VS. KATHLEEN MAGANA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GERMAN MOTORS COLLISION CENTER

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-01-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-01-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
